label: ID.AM-01
definition: Inventories of hardware managed by the organization are maintained

label: ID.AM-02
definition: Inventories of software, services, and systems managed by the organization are maintained

label: ID.AM-03
definition: Representations of the organization's authorized network communication and internal and external network data flows are maintained

label: ID.AM-04
definition: Inventories of services provided by suppliers are maintained

label: ID.AM-05
definition: Assets are prioritized based on classification, criticality, resources, and impact on the mission

label: ID.AM-07
definition: Inventories of data and corresponding metadata for designated data types are maintained

label: ID.AM-08
definition: Systems, hardware, software, services, and data are managed throughout their life cycles
